content_body: Thank you all for taking such good care of this cabin. Our family really appreciates cleanliness and The River’s Edge sure met our standards! The view is spectacular. We had perfect weather. Our mornings were in the 70’s and afternoons 90’s, but there was always a nice breeze. We traveled to Six Flags Waterpark one day and everyone had a blast. We went to Funworld today. If you have kids, this place is highly recommended. We had a total of 7 adults and 7 kids. We also enjoyed picking blackberries all around and they’re very tasty and safe to eat! We enjoyed roasting marshmallows, catching lightning bugs, and playing games together. We did some hiking and enjoyed the scenery of the North Georgia Mountains so much. The love and peace of God was with us always. May God bless The River’s Edge and all its guests forever.
title: Met Our Standards!
